apps:property.name: hasTheWord
apps:property.value: {"thank you for your purchase" "thanks for your purchase" "transaction total" "amount charged" "your receipt" "order confirmation" "e-receipt" "payment received" "fuel receipt" "price per gallon" gallons "fuel rewards" subject:receipt subject:invoice from:shell.com from:fuelrewards.com from:email.fuelrewards.com from:gasbuddy.com from:notifications.chevronmobileapp.com from:rewards.sheetz.com from:upside.com from:getupside.com from:circlekeasy.com from:kwiktrip.com from:murphyusa.com from:murphydriverewards.com from:maverik.com from:speedway.com} -from:google.com -from:youtube.com -from:accounts.google.com
